payload.label: table lamp
payload.long_description: Small white fabric table lamp with a scalloped, slightly pleated shade and decorative trim; ceramic/painted white ornamental base is partially visible and cut off at the bottom, with faux-greenery wrapped around the stem. The lamp is turned on, casting a warm glow; appears to be approximately 0.7 m from the camera.
